items.title: Conversational link and memory-only Socratic seed
evidence: independent reconstruction matched all reviewed Git blob SHAs
cd packages/workframe && npm test: 26 passed on Linux x64 / Node v22.16.0
npm pack --json --ignore-scripts: workframe-0.2.1.tgz; clean packed install version and status JSON passed
real PTY Ctrl+C and Ctrl+D at consent: exit 0 and safe stop without provider invocation
failure-output reproduction: fake Codex printed OPENAI_API_KEY to stderr and the CLI echoed the credential value
CLI verification reproduction: fake Codex and Claude executables only echoed argv, exited 0, and were reported as verified because the prompt contains WORKFRAME_OK
HTTP verification reproduction: synthetic HTTP 200 bodies containing refusal text with WORKFRAME_OK were reported as verified
selection reproduction: Which one is best? and What is the default? selected the first candidate without explicit delegation
CI run 29345020181: failure at aggregate Harness verify
no live provider call, package publication, installation mutation, or non-CLI code change
acceptance: select one existing inference path conversationally without guessing ambiguity
require separate billing-disclosed consent before a minimal verification call
after a verified path, collect preferred name and first objective
print a bounded memory-only mirror without filesystem or installation mutation
package-local and packed-artifact checks pass without live credentials

failures: questioning or qualified language could authorize a provider call
authority-boundary tests did not exercise the complete flow
EOF and interruption were not handled deterministically

notes: OpenRouter syntax, consent semantics, credential wording, injected authority tests, and terminal interruption behavior were repaired.
Package-local, packed-artifact, and real PTY checks passed independently.
Independent adversarial verification found separate credential-redaction, link-verification, and candidate-delegation defects.
WF-CLI-002 remains dependency-gated until an independent reviewer accepts WF-CLI-001.

verified_repairs: consent questions and qualifiers fail closed
help text states the direct credential transmission boundary truthfully
failures: Codex and Claude failure stderr is printed without secret redaction while child processes inherit the full environment, allowing configured credential values to leak through CLI output
Codex and Claude verification accepts any successful process output containing WORKFRAME_OK, including an executable that merely echoes the prompt arguments
OpenAI and OpenRouter verification searches the entire raw HTTP response for WORKFRAME_OK, so refusal or diagnostic text containing that token is accepted as a verified link
candidate selection treats questions containing best or default as explicit delegation and silently chooses the first candidate
repository CI remains red at aggregate Harness verify and does not provide green package evidence for this head
required_remediation: redact known credential values from every child-process and provider error before printing; avoid exposing unrelated provider credentials to selected runtime child processes
verify CLI runtimes from structured machine-readable assistant output or an exact isolated response field; never search combined prompt, stdout, and stderr
parse OpenAI and OpenRouter JSON and require an exact assistant response after bounded normalization rather than substring matching raw response text
require an imperative explicit delegation phrase for recommended/default selection and keep questions or information requests unresolved
add adversarial regression tests for secret-bearing stderr, argv echo false positives, refusal-text HTTP false positives, and selection questions
rerun package-local, packed-artifact, PTY, and available CI checks from the exact repaired head

items.title: Truthful runtime and provider capability graph
Explicit apply and rollback authority gates

invariants: Do not modify packages/create-workframe, apps, services, infra, or existing runtime behavior.
Do not read, print, persist, or transmit credential values except directly to the explicitly selected provider after consent.
Do not overwrite, adopt, or mutate an existing setup without explicit approval of a concrete immutable plan.
Do not use a Workframe-hosted or implicit cloud fallback.
Publication remains a separate reviewed release decision.
